definition: A liberation of mind cultivated through one of the brahmaviharas.
notes: The project keeps mettā audible as friendliness in this compound, following the live mettā headword. The phrase should be written out rather than abbreviated with an ellipsis in translation notes or control surfaces. Love-language remains too broad and unstable for this repository's default mettā policy.

context_rules.context: When discussing the four brahmavihāra liberations as a list
context_rules.notes: Write the full rendering rather than using an ellipsis placeholder.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the brahmavihāra compound with the governed mettā rendering.
